benefits.description: Weight loss; Tirzepatide initially worked then stalled. Retatrutide broke the stall and restored appetite suppression. Cycling back to Semaglutide at lower dose brought back appetite suppression.
Appetite suppression particularly helpful for binge eater; regained when cycling to Semaglutide (evidenced by return of burps).
Reduced anxiety; able to attend social events and interact with people; improved from baseline anxiety that previously kept her isolated.
Improved overall mood and happiness; reduced alcohol cravings and self-medicating behaviors.
Improved ADHD symptom management (bonus effect noted).

side_effects.description: BPC-157 and TB-500 seemed to make her short-tempered and on edge; unclear if causative as she was also dealing with father's death during same period.

protocol_notes: One year of research peptide use. Did not follow strict protocol with Tirzepatide, 'winged it' with dosage. Added Retatrutide after Tirzepatide stall. Currently cycling back to Semaglutide only at lower dose due to tolerance buildup. Previously tried Semaglutide through med spa at $600/month before switching to research peptides. Also on ADHD and anxiety medication from PCP started late fall prior to peptide use. Experimenting with BPC-157, TB-500, NAD+, and GHK-Cu with more details promised later. Mentioned father's death during BPC-157/TB-500 use which may have confounded side effects.
